title: Misc Create Fixes
description: Simple bug fixes for some create mods.
body:
A simple mod i made that fixes some annoying or gamebreaking bugs in some create mods, to make them more survival friendly.

Right now it fixes one bug.

When you assemble a ship with Valkyrien Skies and there are copycats from create on it, the block inside will both drop as an item and remain in the copycat.

Currently this mod only fixes that bug.
